calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-30-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-30-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Gary Feliciano. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

John Zanghi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff The Tides Center, a California Non Profit Public Benefit Corporation.
Denise Riggins, General Manager for plaintiff The Tides Center, a California Non Profit Public Benefit Corporation, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Timothy Reeve.

Plaintiff's complaint was filed on March 15, 2018.
Defendant's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on March 20, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on April 10, 2018.
DOE defendants were dimissed today, April 30, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff The Tides Center, a California Non Profit Public Benefit Corporation, and against defendant Timothy Reeve, as follows:

Past Due Rent - $800.00.
Holdover Damages - $679.83.
Costs - $315.00.
Total - $1,794.83

Additionally, plaintiff The Tides Center, a California Non Profit Public Benefit Corporation, is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1100 Ocean Avenue, #422, San Francisco, CA 94112.

The rental agreement is canceled and the lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides Center is present. Represented by Denise Regans.
Attorney John Zangi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Timothy Reeve is NOT present.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Apr-30-2018 remains on calendar. (501)
